## Summary

**Tech Stack Reviewed:**
- **Target (DataFlow Systems)**: Legacy Java core engine with 60% complete Rust rewrite in progress, SOC 2 Type II & HIPAA compliant
- **Public WebApp**: Scala 3 demo/marketing site (in-memory, no auth, POC-stage - not core IP)

**Key Technical Risks Identified:**

| Risk | Rating | Impact |
|------|--------|--------|
| Key Personnel (CTO holds 3/14 patents) | CRITICAL | -$30M to -$50M |
| Legacy Java Technical Debt | HIGH | -$15M to -$25M |
| Rust Rewrite Incomplete (60%) | HIGH | -$10M to -$20M if delayed |
| Integration/Tech Gap | MEDIUM-HIGH | -$10M to -$15M |

**Valuation Recommendation:** Net risk adjustment of -$65M to -$110M suggests effective valuation of $290M-$335M vs. $400M walk-away price

**Top Recommendation:** Prioritize CTO/lead engineer retention negotiations before LOI execution
